subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in exploring a potential partnership.

I’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call. Would any of the following time windows work for you (UTC)?

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot you prefer, or feel free to propose an alternative if none of these are convenient.

Regarding internal contact information, I'm not able to share direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering, but once we have a meeting scheduled, I can help ensure the appropriate people are looped in from our side.

Best regards,
Agent
